description: A black Volkswagen sedan viewed from the side in dim nighttime light (image appears blurry). The vehicle shows used wear with tinted windows. It features off headlights and angular taillights, complemented by a horizontal grille with straight edges. The clean sloped roof sits above new medium regular tires with intact bumpers. Side mirrors are intact. License plate is visible. Spoiler is not present. Roof rack is not present. Exhaust system features hidden pipes.
